headline: MAA Announces Regular Quarterly Preferred Dividend
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc., or MAA (NYSE: MAA), today announced a full quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per outstanding share of its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The dividend is payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 13, 2026.
